input.subject: Graduation Party for Tyler!
input.snippet: Please join us to celebrate Tyler's graduation...
input.body_text:
CLASS OF 2026!

Please join us to celebrate
TYLER THOMPSON'S
High School Graduation!

Saturday, June 13th, 2026
3:00 PM - 7:00 PM

The Thompson Residence
1234 Oak Drive
San Jose, CA 95123

Backyard BBQ & Pool Party!
Bring your swimsuit! 🏊‍♂️

RSVP: dave.thompson@gmail.com by June 6th

Congratulations Tyler!

The Thompson Family
